chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-1347 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 25.11.2021. Mr. Aijaz Hussain Jatoi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi, Asst. Attorney General for Pakistan. = Through this petition, the petitioner is asking for a direction to the respondents to release pension of her late husband namely Hussain Bux s/o Ali Nawaz Chandio, who was the employee of Railway Department as Fitter (C&W) and died on 14.01.2020. Syed Shahzad Ali Shah, Advocate, who is present in Court in some other matters has waived notice of this petition and undertakes that case of the petitioner’s late husband namely Hussain Bux for pensionary / retiring benefits will be processed and completed within a period of one month and all the outstanding arrears would be paid to her in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied with the said statement and seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE *Hafiz Fahad*
